requirement_topic.en: Panama Market Access — COPANIT / DGNTI, ASEP, and Growing EV Infrastructure
requirement_topic.zh: 巴拿马市场准入——COPANIT / DGNTI、ASEP及增长中的电动汽车基础设施
requirement_topic.zht: 巴拿馬市場准入——COPANIT / DGNTI、ASEP及增長中的電動汽車基礎設施

summary.en: Panama has a national electric-mobility strategy and a growing EV charging market around Panama City, fleet operations, logistics corridors, and commercial sites. DGNTI under MICI is the national standardization and conformity-assessment body; ASEP regulates the electricity sector; and distributors such as EDEMET, EDECHI, and ENSA control service connection conditions. Market opportunity does not remove the need to confirm product conformity, import route, Spanish documentation, 60 Hz electrical input, connector ecosystem, installation acceptance, and after-sales support.
summary.zh: 巴拿马已制定国家电动出行战略，充电市场正在围绕巴拿马城、车队运营、物流走廊和商业站点增长。MICI下属DGNTI是国家标准化和合格评定机构；ASEP监管电力部门；EDEMET、EDECHI和ENSA等配电公司控制服务接入条件。市场机会并不免除对产品合格评定、进口路径、西班牙语文件、60 Hz电气输入、接口生态、安装验收和售后支持的确认。
summary.zht: 巴拿馬已制定國家電動出行戰略，充電市場正在圍繞巴拿馬城、車隊運營、物流走廊和商業站點增長。MICI下屬DGNTI是國家標準化和合格評定機構；ASEP監管電力部門；EDEMET、EDECHI和ENSA等配電公司控制服務接入條件。市場機會並不免除對產品合格評定、進口路徑、西班牙語文件、60 Hz電氣輸入、接口生態、安裝驗收和售後支持的確認。

standards_or_laws: COPANIT / DGNTI standards, conformity assessment, and quality certification functions
ASEP regulation and supervision of Panama electricity services
Distributor service and project acceptance requirements
IEC 61851, IEC 61851-23, IEC 62196, and IEC 61000 as international technical baselines where adopted or specified

summary.en: China's EV charger industry operates under domestic GB/T product standards, GB/T connector requirements, China grid acceptance, and China-language documentation. High China production volume or GB/T compliance does not create automatic Panama market access. The export package must be converted for Panama's regulator, distributor, buyer, language, voltage/frequency, connector, and support environment.
summary.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩行业依据国内GB/T产品标准、GB/T接口要求、中国电网验收及中文文件运行。中国的大规模产能或GB/T符合性并不会自动形成巴拿马市场准入。出口资料包必须转换为适合巴拿马监管机构、配电公司、买方、语言、电压/频率、接口和支持环境的版本。
summary.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁行業依據國內GB/T產品標準、GB/T接口要求、中國電網驗收及中文文件運行。中國的大規模產能或GB/T符合性並不會自動形成巴拿馬市場准入。出口資料包必須轉換為適合巴拿馬監管機構、配電公司、買方、語言、電壓/頻率、接口和支持環境的版本。

standards_or_laws: China domestic charger certification and grid acceptance requirements

gap.en: Exporters should verify whether the product needs COPANIT / DGNTI conformity documents, whether a Panama importer or local service partner must hold records, which distributor will approve the installation, whether the buyer requires IEC test reports, which connector is specified, and how spare parts, Spanish manuals, warranties, cybersecurity updates, and technician training will be handled. For public or high-power sites, ASEP/distributor coordination and load studies should be scheduled before shipment.
gap.zh: 出口商应核实产品是否需要COPANIT / DGNTI合格文件、是否须由巴拿马进口商或本地服务伙伴保存记录、哪家配电公司将批准安装、买方是否要求IEC测试报告、指定何种接口，以及备件、西班牙语手册、质保、网络安全更新和技术人员培训如何处理。对于公共或大功率站点，应在出货前安排ASEP/配电公司协调及负荷研究。
gap.zht: 出口商應核實產品是否需要COPANIT / DGNTI合格文件、是否須由巴拿馬進口商或本地服務夥伴保存記錄、哪家配電公司將批准安裝、買方是否要求IEC測試報告、指定何種接口，以及備件、西班牙語手冊、質保、網絡安全更新和技術人員培訓如何處理。對於公共或大功率站點，應在出貨前安排ASEP/配電公司協調及負荷研究。

mandatory_status.target: Market-access and project-planning context — specific obligations depend on product category, HS code, buyer, site load, distributor territory, and project specification
mandatory_status.cn: China domestic certifications and market experience do not substitute for Panama import, conformity, grid, or project requirements

source.publisher: Dirección General de Normas y Tecnología Industrial (DGNTI), MICI Panama

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Panama EV growth creates procurement opportunity, but it is not a conformity shortcut. Before bidding or shipping, confirm COPANIT / DGNTI scope, ASEP/distributor coordination, 60 Hz ratings, connector selection, Spanish documentation, and local service responsibilities.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 巴拿马电动汽车增长带来采购机会，但不是合规捷径。在投标或出货前，应确认COPANIT / DGNTI适用范围、ASEP/配电公司协调、60 Hz额定值、接口选择、西班牙语文件和本地服务责任。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 巴拿馬電動汽車增長帶來採購機會，但不是合規捷徑。在投標或出貨前，應確認COPANIT / DGNTI適用範圍、ASEP/配電公司協調、60 Hz額定值、接口選擇、西班牙語文件和本地服務責任。
